settings.quote: This pump made going back to work possible. It's quiet, reliable, and I didn't have to fight with insurance to get it.
I was overwhelmed by the insurance process until Ardent stepped in. They handled everything and I got my pump in a week.
The quality is there and the price is right. No hassle, no confusion, just what I needed when I needed it.
